sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID WHERE T1.Net_Worth_Millions > (SELECT AVG(Net_Worth_Millions) FROM singer) GROUP BY T1.Name;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of singers whose net worth is greater than the average net worth of all singers.

sql: SELECT T2.Birth_Year FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID GROUP BY T2.Birth_Year ORDER BY SUM(T1.Sales) DESC LIMIT 2;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the top two singer birth years, ranked from highest to lowest based on the total sales of songs performed by singers from that year.

sql: SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Singer_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Singer_ID FROM song WHERE Singer_ID IS NOT NULL);
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of singers who do not have any associated songs recorded in the database.

sql: SELECT T1.Title FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID WHERE T2.Citizenship = (SELECT Citizenship FROM singer WHERE Name = 'Alice Walton');
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the titles of songs performed by singers who share the same citizenship as the singer 'Alice Walton'.

sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID WHERE T1.Highest_Position = 1.0 UNION SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Citizenship = 'France';
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the unique names of singers who are either from France or have had a number one hit song.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID WHERE T1.Birth_Year > (SELECT MIN(Birth_Year) FROM singer);
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the unique names of singers who have recorded a song and are not the oldest singer(s) in the dataset.

sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID GROUP BY T2.Name HAVING SUM(T1.Sales) < 1000000;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the names of singers whose cumulative song sales are less than 1,000,000.

sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID WHERE T2.Citizenship = 'France' GROUP BY T2.Name HAVING count(T1.Song_ID) > 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the name of any French singer who has recorded more than one song.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Name FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID EXCEPT SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Citizenship = 'France';
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the unique names of all singers who have recorded a song, excluding any singers with French citizenship.

sql: SELECT T1.Citizenship, AVG(T1.Net_Worth_Millions) FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID GROUP BY T1.Citizenship;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing each citizenship alongside the average net worth of singers from that country.

sql: SELECT Title FROM song WHERE Sales > (SELECT AVG(Sales) FROM song);
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the titles of songs whose sales are greater than the average sales across all songs.

sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 WHERE T1.Singer_ID IN (SELECT Singer_ID FROM song) AND T1.Citizenship IN (SELECT Citizenship FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of singers who have recorded at least one song and who also share their citizenship with other singers in the database.

sql: SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Citizenship = 'United States' INTERSECT SELECT T2.Name FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of singers who are from the United States and have recorded at least one song.

sql: SELECT AVG(T1.Net_Worth_Millions) FROM singer AS T1 WHERE T1.Singer_ID IN (SELECT Singer_ID FROM song GROUP BY Singer_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);
result_summary: Returns 1 row calculating the average net worth, in millions, for all singers who have released more than one song.

sql: SELECT T1.Title FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID WHERE T2.Birth_Year = (SELECT MAX(Birth_Year) FROM singer WHERE Singer_ID IN (SELECT Singer_ID FROM song));
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the title of a song performed by the youngest singer who has a recorded song.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Net_Worth_Millions, T1.Net_Worth_Millions - T2.Avg_Worth FROM singer AS T1 JOIN (SELECT Citizenship, AVG(Net_Worth_Millions) AS Avg_Worth FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship) AS T2 ON T1.Citizenship = T2.Citizenship;
result_summary: Returns 8 rows showing each singer's name and net worth, along with the difference between their individual wealth and the average wealth of singers from the same country.

sql: SELECT T2.Name, T2.Citizenship FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID GROUP BY T1.Singer_ID, T2.Name, T2.Citizenship ORDER BY SUM(T1.Sales) DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row identifying the name and citizenship of the top-selling singer, determined by the highest total sum of their song sales.

sql: SELECT T1.Title, T3.Name, T1.Sales - T2.Avg_Sales FROM song AS T1 JOIN (SELECT Singer_ID, AVG(Sales) AS Avg_Sales FROM song GROUP BY Singer_ID) AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID JOIN singer AS T3 ON T1.Singer_ID = T3.Singer_ID;
result_summary: Returns 8 rows listing each song's title, the singer's name, and the difference between that specific song's sales and the singer's average sales across all their songs.

sql: SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Net_Worth_Millions > (SELECT MIN(Net_Worth_Millions) FROM singer WHERE Citizenship = 'United States');
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing the names of singers who are wealthier than the least wealthy American singer in the dataset.

sql: SELECT 'Exists' FROM singer WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM singer WHERE Citizenship = 'France' AND Net_Worth_Millions > 25);
result_summary: Returns 8 rows containing the static text 'Exists', confirming that at least one singer from France has a net worth greater than 25 million; the row count reflects the total number of singers in the table.

sql: SELECT T1.Citizenship, T1.Name, T1.Net_Worth_Millions FROM singer AS T1 JOIN (SELECT Citizenship, MAX(Net_Worth_Millions) AS Max_Worth FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship) AS T2 ON T1.Citizenship = T2.Citizenship AND T1.Net_Worth_Millions = T2.Max_Worth;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows identifying the wealthiest singer from each country, listing their citizenship, name, and net worth in millions.

sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID WHERE T2.Citizenship = 'United States' GROUP BY T2.Name HAVING SUM(T1.Sales) < (SELECT AVG(T3.Sales) FROM song AS T3 JOIN singer AS T4 ON T3.Singer_ID = T4.Singer_ID WHERE T4.Citizenship = 'France');
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of US singers whose total song sales are less than the average sales of a single song by a French artist.

sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID WHERE T1.Sales > 1000000 INTERSECT SELECT T4.Name FROM song AS T3 JOIN singer AS T4 ON T3.Singer_ID = T4.Singer_ID WHERE T3.Sales < 600000;
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the name of a singer who has had both a highly successful song (over 1 million in sales) and a less successful one (under 600,000 in sales).

sql: SELECT Company_name, Type, Incorporated_in FROM culture_company;
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing each company's name, its business type, and its country of incorporation.

sql: SELECT Title, Director FROM movie WHERE Year = 1999;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the title and director for each movie released in the year 1999.

sql: SELECT Book_Title, Publisher FROM book_club WHERE Author_or_Editor = 'Michael Nava';
result_summary: Returns 1 row with the book title and publisher for books written by 'Michael Nava'.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT Category FROM book_club;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the distinct book categories available in the book club.

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie;
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the total count of all movies in the dataset.

sql: SELECT Book_Title, Author_or_Editor FROM book_club WHERE Publisher = 'Alyson';
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the book titles and their authors/editors for books published by 'Alyson'.

sql: SELECT Company_name, Type FROM culture_company WHERE Incorporated_in = 'China';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing culture companies incorporated in China, showing each company's name and its business type.

sql: SELECT Title, Gross_worldwide FROM movie ORDER BY Gross_worldwide DESC;
result_summary: Returns 10 rows listing movie titles and their worldwide gross earnings, ordered from highest grossing to lowest.

sql: SELECT Book_Title, Author_or_Editor FROM book_club WHERE Result = 'Nom';
result_summary: Returns 9 rows listing the title and author/editor for all books that received a nomination.

sql: SELECT Title, Budget_million FROM movie WHERE Budget_million > 6.0;
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing the titles and budgets (in millions) for movies with a budget greater than 6 million dollars.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name, T2.Title FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id;
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing each cultural company's name and the title of its corresponding movie.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name, T2.Book_Title FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN book_club AS T2 ON T1.book_club_id = T2.book_club_id;
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing each company's name and the corresponding book title for its associated book club.

sql: SELECT Incorporated_in, COUNT(*) FROM culture_company GROUP BY Incorporated_in;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing each incorporation location and the total number of culture companies registered there.

sql: SELECT Director, COUNT(*) FROM movie GROUP BY Director HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1;
result_summary: Returns 9 rows listing each director and the total number of movies they have directed.

sql: SELECT T2.Book_Title, T1.Company_name FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN book_club AS T2 ON T1.book_club_id = T2.book_club_id WHERE T2.Year = 1989;
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing the book titles and their corresponding company names for book club selections made in the year 1989.

sql: SELECT T2.Title, T1.Company_name FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.Year = 1999;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the titles of movies released in 1999 along with the corresponding production company name.

sql: SELECT Type, SUM(Group_Equity_Shareholding) FROM culture_company GROUP BY Type;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing each company type alongside the total group equity shareholding for that type.

sql: SELECT Author_or_Editor, COUNT(*) FROM book_club GROUP BY Author_or_Editor HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1;
result_summary: Returns 12 rows listing each author or editor and the total count of their books for authors with at least one book in the dataset.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN book_club AS T2 ON T1.book_club_id = T2.book_club_id WHERE T2.Book_Title = 'Goldenboy';
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the name of the company whose book club is reading the book 'Goldenboy'.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.Title = 'Storm Catcher';
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the name of the culture company associated with the movie 'Storm Catcher'.

sql: SELECT Title, Budget_million FROM movie WHERE Budget_million > (SELECT Budget_million FROM movie WHERE Title = 'The Boondock Saints');
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing the titles and budgets for movies with a budget greater than that of 'The Boondock Saints'.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN book_club AS T2 ON T1.book_club_id = T2.book_club_id WHERE T2.Category = 'Gay M/SF';
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the names of companies whose book clubs are categorized as 'Gay M/SF'.

sql: SELECT MAX(Group_Equity_Shareholding) FROM culture_company WHERE Incorporated_in = 'Hong Kong';
result_summary: Returns 1 row showing the maximum group equity shareholding among all culture companies incorporated in Hong Kong.

sql: SELECT movie_id, Title FROM movie WHERE movie_id NOT IN (SELECT movie_id FROM culture_company WHERE movie_id IS NOT NULL);
result_summary: Returns 4 rows showing the ID and title for each movie that is not associated with a culture company.

sql: SELECT Type, AVG(Group_Equity_Shareholding) FROM culture_company WHERE Incorporated_in = 'China' GROUP BY Type;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the average group equity shareholding for each company type among companies incorporated in China.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name, T2.Title, T3.Book_Title FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id JOIN book_club AS T3 ON T1.book_club_id = T3.book_club_id;
result_summary: Returns 6 rows, listing each culture company's name along with the titles of its associated movie and book club book.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name, T2.Title, T3.Book_Title FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id JOIN book_club AS T3 ON T1.book_club_id = T3.book_club_id WHERE T1.Incorporated_in = 'China';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows for culture companies incorporated in China, listing each company's name along with its associated movie title and book club title.

sql: SELECT Company_name, Group_Equity_Shareholding FROM culture_company WHERE Group_Equity_Shareholding > (SELECT AVG(Group_Equity_Shareholding) FROM culture_company);
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the names and group equity shareholding of companies whose shareholding is above the overall average across all companies.

sql: SELECT T1.Title, T1.Director, T1.Budget_million FROM movie AS T1 WHERE T1.Budget_million = (SELECT MAX(T2.Budget_million) FROM movie AS T2 WHERE T2.Director = T1.Director);
result_summary: Returns 9 rows, each showing a director's most expensive movie along with its title and budget in millions.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name, T2.Title FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.Budget_million = (SELECT MAX(T3.Budget_million) FROM movie AS T3 WHERE T3.Year = T2.Year);
result_summary: Returns 2 rows showing the company name and movie title for movies that had the maximum budget in their respective year of release.

sql: SELECT T2.Author_or_Editor FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN book_club AS T2 ON T1.book_club_id = T2.book_club_id GROUP BY T2.Author_or_Editor HAVING SUM(T1.Group_Equity_Shareholding) > 50.0;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the authors or editors for whom the total group equity shareholding in their associated culture companies exceeds 50.

sql: SELECT T_derived.Type, AVG(T_derived.Budget_million) FROM (SELECT T1.Type, T2.Budget_million FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id) AS T_derived GROUP BY T_derived.Type;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing each culture company type along with the average movie budget (in millions) for the movies associated with that type.

sql: SELECT Author_or_Editor AS Person_Name, 'Author' AS Role FROM book_club UNION SELECT Director, 'Director' AS Role FROM movie;
result_summary: Returns 21 rows creating a combined list of creative professionals, identifying each person's name and their assigned role as either 'Author' or 'Director'.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id JOIN book_club AS T3 ON T1.book_club_id = T3.book_club_id WHERE T2.Budget_million > 4.0 AND T3.Result = 'Nom';
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the names of culture companies associated with movies budgeted over $4 million and book clubs that achieved a 'Nom' result.

sql: SELECT Director FROM movie EXCEPT SELECT Author_or_Editor FROM book_club;
result_summary: Returns 9 rows listing the names of movie directors who are not also listed as an author or editor in the book club.

sql: SELECT T1.Type, SUM(T2.Budget_million), COUNT(T3.book_club_id) FROM culture_company AS T1 LEFT JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id LEFT JOIN book_club AS T3 ON T1.book_club_id = T3.book_club_id GROUP BY T1.Type;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows, one for each culture company type, showing the total movie budget in millions and the total count of associated book clubs.

sql: SELECT T2.Title FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.book_club_id IN (SELECT book_club_id FROM book_club WHERE Result = 'Won [A ]');
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the title of the movie associated with an award-winning book club.

sql: SELECT Company_name FROM culture_company WHERE book_club_id IN (SELECT book_club_id FROM book_club WHERE Result = 'Won [A ]') AND movie_id IN (SELECT movie_id FROM movie WHERE Gross_worldwide > 3000000);
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the name of a company that is associated with both an award-winning book club and a movie that grossed over 3 million worldwide.

sql: SELECT T2.Publisher FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN book_club AS T2 ON T1.book_club_id = T2.book_club_id WHERE T1.Type = 'Joint Venture' GROUP BY T2.Publisher ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the name of the publisher with the most 'Joint Venture' culture companies.

sql: WITH ChinaCompanies AS (SELECT Company_name, book_club_id, movie_id FROM culture_company WHERE Incorporated_in = 'China') SELECT T1.Company_name, T2.Book_Title, T3.Title FROM ChinaCompanies AS T1 JOIN book_club AS T2 ON T1.book_club_id = T2.book_club_id JOIN movie AS T3 ON T1.movie_id = T3.movie_id;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing companies incorporated in China, along with the titles of the books and movies associated with each company.

sql: SELECT T3.Publisher, AVG(T2.Budget_million) FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id JOIN book_club AS T3 ON T1.book_club_id = T3.book_club_id GROUP BY T3.Publisher;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing each book publisher alongside the average budget (in millions) for their associated movies.

sql: SELECT Year, COUNT(*) AS Count, 'Movie' AS Type FROM movie GROUP BY Year UNION ALL SELECT Year, COUNT(*), 'Book' AS Type FROM book_club GROUP BY Year;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows providing a yearly count for both movies and books, with a 'Type' column distinguishing between the two categories.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name FROM culture_company AS T1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie AS T2 WHERE T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id AND T2.Budget_million > 5.0);
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing the names of culture companies associated with movies that have a budget exceeding 5 million.

sql: SELECT T1.Book_Title FROM book_club AS T1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM culture_company AS T2 WHERE T1.book_club_id = T2.book_club_id);
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing the titles of books from book clubs that are not associated with any culture company.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name, T2.Company_name, T1.Incorporated_in FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN culture_company AS T2 ON T1.Incorporated_in = T2.Incorporated_in WHERE T1.Company_name < T2.Company_name;
result_summary: Returns 7 rows that pair different companies incorporated in the same location, listing both company names and their shared incorporation location.

sql: SELECT T2.Director FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.Type = 'Joint Venture' GROUP BY T2.Director ORDER BY AVG(T2.Gross_worldwide) DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row identifying the director with the highest average worldwide gross for movies produced as a 'Joint Venture'.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name, T2.Title, T3.Book_Title FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id JOIN book_club AS T3 ON T1.book_club_id = T3.book_club_id WHERE T2.Director = 'Anthony Hickox' AND T3.Publisher = 'St. Martin''s Press';
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the company name, movie title, and book title for entries associated with a movie directed by 'Anthony Hickox' and a book published by 'St. Martin's Press'.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name, T2.Title, T2.Budget_million FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.Budget_million > (SELECT AVG(Budget_million) FROM movie WHERE Year = 1999);
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing the company name, movie title, and budget for movies with a budget greater than the average movie budget of 1999.

sql: SELECT T3.Category FROM culture_company AS T1 JOIN movie AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id JOIN book_club AS T3 ON T1.book_club_id = T3.book_club_id GROUP BY T3.Category HAVING AVG(T2.Budget_million) > 5.5;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the book club categories for which the average budget of associated movies exceeds 5.5 million.

sql: SELECT T1.Company_name FROM culture_company AS T1 WHERE T1.Group_Equity_Shareholding < (SELECT AVG(T2.Group_Equity_Shareholding) FROM culture_company AS T2 WHERE T2.Type = 'Joint Venture');
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of companies whose group equity shareholding is below the average shareholding of all companies classified as 'Joint Venture'.

sql: SELECT Name, Year FROM musical;
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing the name and release year for each musical.

sql: SELECT Name, age FROM actor;
result_summary: Returns 9 rows listing the name and age for every actor in the dataset.

sql: SELECT Name, Award FROM musical WHERE Year = 1986;
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing the name and award for each musical released in the year 1986.

sql: SELECT Name, age FROM actor WHERE age > 25;
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the name and age of any actor older than 25.

sql: SELECT Name, Category, Nominee FROM musical WHERE Award = 'Tony Award';
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing the name, award category, and nominee for all musicals that have received a 'Tony Award'.

sql: SELECT Actor_ID, Character, age FROM actor WHERE Name = 'Ray Meagher';
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the Actor ID, character, and age for the actor named 'Ray Meagher'.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT Category FROM musical;
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing each unique award category available for musicals.

sql: SELECT Name, Character FROM actor ORDER BY Name ASC;
result_summary: Returns 9 rows listing each actor's name and the character they play, ordered alphabetically by the actor's name.

sql: SELECT Name, Year FROM musical WHERE Result = 'Nominated';
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the name and year of musicals that were nominated for an award.

sql: SELECT Name, age FROM actor ORDER BY age DESC;
result_summary: Returns 9 rows listing each actor's name and age, ordered from oldest to youngest.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, T2.Name FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID;
result_summary: Returns 9 rows listing the name of each musical alongside the name of an actor who has performed in it.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, COUNT(T2.Actor_ID) FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID GROUP BY T1.Name;
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing each musical by name along with a count of the number of actors in its cast.

sql: SELECT Nominee, COUNT(*) FROM musical GROUP BY Nominee;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing each nominee and the total number of their nominations.

sql: SELECT AVG(age) FROM actor;
result_summary: Returns a single row containing the calculated average age of all actors.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, AVG(T2.age) FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID GROUP BY T1.Name;
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing each musical's name along with the average age of the actors in that musical.

sql: SELECT T2.Name, T2.Character FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'The Phantom of the Opera';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of the actors and the characters they played in the musical 'The Phantom of the Opera'.

sql: SELECT Nominee FROM musical GROUP BY Nominee HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the nominees who have received more than one musical nomination.

sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID GROUP BY T1.Name HAVING COUNT(T2.Actor_ID) > 1;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the names of musicals that feature more than one actor.

sql: SELECT Name, age FROM actor ORDER BY age DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row identifying the oldest actor in the dataset by their name and age.

sql: SELECT T2.Name, T2.Character FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T1.Year = 1986;
result_summary: Returns 9 rows listing the actors' names and the characters they played in musicals released in 1986.

sql: SELECT Category, COUNT(*) FROM musical WHERE Year = 1986 GROUP BY Category;
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing each musical category for the year 1986, along with the total count of musicals within each of those categories.

sql: SELECT Name, COUNT(DISTINCT Category) FROM musical GROUP BY Name;
result_summary: Returns 7 rows, listing each musical's name and the corresponding count of unique categories it is classified under.

sql: SELECT T2.Name, T2.Character, T2.age FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T1.Award = 'Tony Award';
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the name, character played, and age for each actor who performed in a musical that won a Tony Award.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Name FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T2.age > 25;
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the unique name of a musical that has at least one actor older than 25.

sql: SELECT Nominee, COUNT(DISTINCT Award) FROM musical GROUP BY Nominee;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing each musical nominee along with the total count of distinct awards they have been nominated for.

sql: SELECT Name, age FROM actor WHERE Musical_ID IN (SELECT Musical_ID FROM musical WHERE Award = 'Tony Award');
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the name and age of each actor who has performed in a Tony Award-winning musical.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Name FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T2.age > (SELECT AVG(age) FROM actor);
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the unique names of musicals that feature at least one actor who is older than the average age of all actors.

sql: SELECT T1.Nominee, T1.Name FROM musical AS T1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM actor AS T2 WHERE T2.Musical_ID = T1.Musical_ID);
result_summary: Returns 4 rows containing the nominee and name for musicals that have at least one associated actor.

sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID GROUP BY T1.Name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Actor_ID) DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row identifying the name of the musical with the largest cast, determined by counting the number of actors per musical.

sql: SELECT T2.Name, T2.Character FROM actor AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Ray Meagher' AND T2.Name != 'Ray Meagher';
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the name and character of an actor who performed in the same musical as 'Ray Meagher'.

sql: SELECT T2.Name, T2.age FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T1.Category = 'Best Book of a Musical';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the name and age of actors who performed in musicals categorized as 'Best Book of a Musical'.

sql: SELECT Name, age FROM actor WHERE age < (SELECT AVG(T1.age) FROM actor AS T1 JOIN musical AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T2.Name = 'The Phantom of the Opera');
result_summary: Returns 8 rows listing the name and age of actors who are younger than the average age of the cast from the musical 'The Phantom of the Opera'.

sql: SELECT Nominee FROM musical WHERE Year = 1986 EXCEPT SELECT Name FROM actor;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the musical nominees from the year 1986 who are not also registered in the actor table.

sql: SELECT Nominee FROM musical GROUP BY Nominee HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Category) > 1;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of musical nominees who have received nominations in more than one distinct category.

sql: SELECT T2.Name, T2.Character FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T1.Nominee = 'Bob Fosse';
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing the actors and the characters they played in musicals where 'Bob Fosse' was a nominee.

sql: SELECT Name FROM actor UNION SELECT Nominee FROM musical;
result_summary: Returns 11 rows containing a unique, consolidated list of names of all individuals who are either actors or musical nominees.

sql: SELECT Name FROM musical WHERE Nominee = 'Bob Fosse' INTERSECT SELECT Name FROM musical WHERE Category = 'Best Direction of a Musical';
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the name of the musical for which Bob Fosse was a nominee in the 'Best Direction of a Musical' category.

sql: SELECT T2.Category, AVG(T1.age) FROM actor AS T1 JOIN musical AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID GROUP BY T2.Category;
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing each musical category along with the average age of the actors who performed in musicals within that category.

sql: SELECT T1.Nominee, T1.Name FROM musical AS T1 WHERE T1.Musical_ID IN (SELECT T2.Musical_ID FROM actor AS T2 GROUP BY T2.Musical_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the nominee and name for musicals that feature more than one actor.

sql: SELECT Nominee FROM musical WHERE Year = 1986 GROUP BY Nominee ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row showing the nominee who had the most musical appearances or nominations in the year 1986.

sql: SELECT T2.Name, T2.Character FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Les Misérables' UNION SELECT T2.Name, T2.Character FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'The Phantom of the Opera';
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing the names of actors and the characters they play in the musicals 'Les Misérables' and 'The Phantom of the Opera'.

sql: SELECT Name FROM actor WHERE Name NOT IN (SELECT Nominee FROM musical);
result_summary: Returns 9 rows listing the names of actors who are not also listed as nominees in a musical.

sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T2.age = (SELECT MIN(age) FROM actor);
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of musicals that feature the youngest actor(s) in the database.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Year, T2.actor_count FROM musical AS T1 JOIN (SELECT Musical_ID, count(*) AS actor_count FROM actor GROUP BY Musical_ID) AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T2.actor_count > 1;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the name, year, and total number of actors for each musical that features more than one actor.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Nominee FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T2.Musical_ID IN (SELECT Musical_ID FROM actor GROUP BY Musical_ID HAVING avg(age) < 25);
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the unique nominees for musicals where the average age of the cast is less than 25.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, T2.Name FROM actor AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID AND T1.Actor_ID < T2.Actor_ID;
result_summary: Returns 8 rows listing unique pairs of actors' names who have performed in the same musical.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Nominee FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T2.age = 22;
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the unique musical nominee that featured an actor who is 22 years old.

sql: SELECT Name FROM actor WHERE Actor_ID NOT IN (SELECT T2.Actor_ID FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Les Misérables');
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing the names of all actors who did not perform in the musical 'Les Misérables'.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, T3.c1, T4.c2 FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID JOIN (SELECT Musical_ID, count(*) AS c1 FROM actor GROUP BY Musical_ID) AS T3 ON T1.Musical_ID = T3.Musical_ID JOIN (SELECT Musical_ID, count(*) AS c2 FROM musical GROUP BY Musical_ID) AS T4 ON T1.Musical_ID = T4.Musical_ID GROUP BY T1.Name;
result_summary: Returns 4 rows providing each musical's name, the total number of actors in that musical, and a count of musical records for that specific musical ID.

sql: SELECT T2.Name, T2.age FROM musical AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Musical_ID WHERE T1.Year = 1986 AND T2.Character = 'Alf Stewart';
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the name and age of the actor who played the character 'Alf Stewart' in musicals that were released in the year 1986.

sql: SELECT Device, Carrier FROM device;
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing each device and its associated mobile carrier.

sql: SELECT * FROM shop WHERE Open_Year = 2009;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows, providing all available details for shops that opened specifically in the year 2009.

sql: SELECT Shop_Name, Location FROM shop ORDER BY Shop_Name ASC;
result_summary: Returns 12 rows listing the name and location of every shop, ordered alphabetically by shop name.

sql: SELECT Device FROM device WHERE Carrier = 'MTS Mobility';
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the device associated with the carrier 'MTS Mobility'.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT Software_Platform FROM device;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the unique software platforms available for all devices.

sql: SELECT Shop_Name FROM shop WHERE Location = 'Cymmer';
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the name of the shop located in 'Cymmer'.

sql: SELECT count(*) FROM shop WHERE Open_Year > 2005;
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the total count of shops that were established after the year 2005.

sql: SELECT max(Quantity) FROM stock;
result_summary: Returns 1 row with a single value representing the maximum stock quantity available for any single item.

sql: SELECT Device, Software_Platform FROM device WHERE Device_ID = 2;
result_summary: Returns 1 row identifying the device name and software platform for the specific device with an ID of 2.

sql: SELECT Shop_ID, Quantity FROM stock WHERE Quantity > 100;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the shop ID and its corresponding stock quantity for all items with a stock level greater than 100.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name, T2.Quantity FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID;
result_summary: Returns 8 rows listing each shop's name along with the quantity of an item in its stock.

sql: SELECT T1.Device, T2.Quantity FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID;
result_summary: Returns 8 rows, listing each device name along with its corresponding stock quantity from the inventory.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name, SUM(T2.Quantity) AS Total_Stock FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Shop_Name;
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing each shop's name along with the total quantity of all items in its stock.

sql: SELECT T1.Software_Platform, COUNT(T2.Shop_ID) AS Number_of_Shops FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID GROUP BY T1.Software_Platform;
result_summary: Returns 1 row that counts the number of shops associated with each software platform.

sql: SELECT Shop_Name FROM shop WHERE Open_Year > (SELECT AVG(Open_Year) FROM shop);
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the names of shops that were established more recently than the average opening year of all shops.

sql: SELECT Device FROM device WHERE Device_ID IN (SELECT Device_ID FROM stock);
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of all devices that are currently in stock.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID WHERE T2.Quantity = 100;
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the name of the shop that has an item in stock with a quantity of exactly 100.

sql: SELECT T1.Open_Year, COUNT(*) AS Stock_Entries FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Open_Year;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing each shop opening year alongside the total count of stock entries for all shops that opened in that year.

sql: SELECT AVG(T2.Quantity) FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID WHERE T1.Location = 'Cymmer';
result_summary: Returns 1 row showing the average stock quantity for all items held in shops located in 'Cymmer'.

sql: SELECT T1.Device, T1.Carrier FROM device AS T1 WHERE T1.Device_ID NOT IN (SELECT T2.Device_ID FROM stock);
error_message: Discarded: SQL Runtime Error - no such column: T2.Device_ID

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name FROM shop AS T1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM stock AS T2 WHERE T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID AND T2.Quantity > 130);
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of shops that have at least one item in stock with a quantity greater than 130.

sql: SELECT T1.Device FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID ORDER BY T2.Quantity DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row identifying the device with the highest quantity currently in stock.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name, COUNT(T2.Device_ID) FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Shop_Name;
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing each shop name along with the total count of devices it has in stock.

sql: SELECT T1.Location, MAX(T2.Quantity) FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Location;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing each shop location alongside the maximum stock quantity for any single item found within that location.

sql: SELECT Device FROM device WHERE Package_Version = Applications;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the devices where the package version is the same as the applications version.

sql: SELECT T1.Device, T1.Carrier, T3.Shop_Name, T3.Location FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID JOIN shop AS T3 ON T2.Shop_ID = T3.Shop_ID;
result_summary: Returns 8 rows listing each device currently in stock, showing the device name, its carrier, and the name and location of the shop where it is available.

sql: SELECT T1.Device, T3.Shop_Name FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID JOIN shop AS T3 ON T2.Shop_ID = T3.Shop_ID WHERE T3.Open_Year = 2006;
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the device name and the name of the shop that stocks it, for all shops that opened in the year 2006.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Shop_Name HAVING SUM(T2.Quantity) > 100;
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing the names of shops that have a total stock quantity of more than 100 units across all their products.

sql: SELECT T1.Device FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID GROUP BY T1.Device HAVING COUNT(T2.Shop_ID) >= 3;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of devices that are stocked in three or more different shops.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name, T2.total_stock FROM shop AS T1 JOIN (SELECT Shop_ID, SUM(Quantity) AS total_stock FROM stock GROUP BY Shop_ID) AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID WHERE T2.total_stock > 110;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows identifying shops with a total stock quantity greater than 110, listing each shop's name and its corresponding total stock.

sql: SELECT T1.Device, T1.Carrier FROM device AS T1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM stock AS T2 JOIN shop AS T3 ON T2.Shop_ID = T3.Shop_ID WHERE T2.Device_ID = T1.Device_ID AND T3.Location = 'Cymmer');
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the device and its carrier for any device that is currently stocked in a shop located in 'Cymmer'.

sql: SELECT Device FROM device WHERE Software_Platform = 'Android' UNION SELECT Device FROM device WHERE Carrier = 'Verizon Wireless';
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing the unique devices that either run on the 'Android' software platform or are offered by the 'Verizon Wireless' carrier.

sql: SELECT Device_ID FROM stock WHERE Shop_ID = 1 INTERSECT SELECT Device_ID FROM stock WHERE Shop_ID = 2;
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the ID for any device that is in stock at both Shop ID 1 and Shop ID 2.

sql: SELECT Shop_ID FROM stock WHERE Shop_ID IN (2, 3) EXCEPT SELECT Shop_ID FROM shop WHERE Open_Year = 2014;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the IDs for shops 2 and 3, excluding any from that set that were opened in 2014.

sql: SELECT T1.Software_Platform, AVG(T2.Quantity) FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID JOIN shop AS T3 ON T2.Shop_ID = T3.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Software_Platform HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.Shop_ID) > 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row showing the average stock quantity of devices for each software platform that is sold in more than one shop.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Shop_Name HAVING SUM(T2.Quantity) > (SELECT AVG(Quantity) FROM stock);
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the names of shops whose total inventory quantity is greater than the average quantity of a single stock item across all shops.

sql: SELECT T1.Device FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID GROUP BY T1.Device HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.Shop_ID) > 1;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of devices that are stocked in more than one distinct shop.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Shop_Name ORDER BY SUM(T2.Quantity) DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the name of the shop with the highest total quantity of items in stock.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name FROM shop AS T1 WHERE T1.Open_Year < 2010 AND T1.Shop_ID IN (SELECT Shop_ID FROM stock WHERE Quantity > 100);
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of shops that opened before 2010 and have more than 100 items in stock.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name, COUNT(DISTINCT T3.Software_Platform) AS Platform_Count FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID JOIN device AS T3 ON T2.Device_ID = T3.Device_ID GROUP BY T1.Shop_Name;
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing each shop's name alongside a count of the distinct software platforms available on the devices it stocks.

sql: SELECT T1.Carrier FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID GROUP BY T1.Carrier ORDER BY AVG(T2.Quantity) DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row identifying the carrier that has the highest average stock quantity across all of their devices.

sql: SELECT T1.Device FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID JOIN shop AS T3 ON T2.Shop_ID = T3.Shop_ID WHERE T3.Shop_Name = 'Best Buy' EXCEPT SELECT T1.Device FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID JOIN shop AS T3 ON T2.Shop_ID = T3.Shop_ID WHERE T3.Shop_Name = 'Dinas Device';

result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing shop locations that have a total stock quantity greater than 100, showing each location alongside its total stock count.

sql: SELECT T1.Device FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID WHERE T2.Shop_ID = (SELECT Shop_ID FROM shop ORDER BY Open_Year DESC LIMIT 1);

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Carrier, T3.Location FROM device AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Device_ID = T2.Device_ID JOIN shop AS T3 ON T2.Shop_ID = T3.Shop_ID;
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing the unique combinations of mobile carriers and the shop locations that stock their devices.

sql: SELECT T1.Open_Year, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Shop_ID) AS NumberOfShops FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Open_Year;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows, detailing the number of unique shops that have stock records, grouped and counted by their opening year.

sql: SELECT T1.Shop_Name, SUM(T2.Quantity) AS TotalQty FROM shop AS T1 JOIN stock AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID = T2.Shop_ID GROUP BY T1.Shop_Name HAVING TotalQty < (SELECT T4.Quantity FROM stock AS T4 JOIN shop AS T3 ON T4.Shop_ID = T3.Shop_ID WHERE T3.Shop_Name = 'Ferndale');
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing the name and total stock quantity for each shop whose total inventory is less than the stock quantity of the 'Ferndale' shop.
