sql: SELECT * FROM Player_Attributes WHERE preferred_foot = 'right' LIMIT 10;
result_summary: Returns 10 rows containing all recorded player attributes for a sample of players whose preferred foot is 'right'.

sql: SELECT * FROM Team_Attributes WHERE buildUpPlaySpeedClass = 'Balanced';
result_summary: Returns 1184 rows, providing the complete set of recorded attributes for teams whose build-up play speed style is classified as 'Balanced'.

sql: SELECT player_name, weight FROM Player WHERE weight > 180;
result_summary: Returns 2490 rows listing the name and weight of each player who weighs more than 180.

sql: SELECT player_name FROM Player ORDER BY player_name;
result_summary: Returns 11060 rows listing all player names from the database, sorted alphabetically.

sql: SELECT team_long_name FROM Team WHERE team_api_id = 9987;
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the full name of the team identified by the API ID 9987.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, T2.overall_rating, T2.potential FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Aaron Cresswell';
result_summary: Returns 33 rows listing the historical overall ratings and potential for the player named 'Aaron Cresswell'.

sql: SELECT T1.team_long_name, T2.buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'KRC Genk';
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing the recorded 'build up play speed' values for the team 'KRC Genk'.

sql: SELECT T1.name, T2.name FROM Country AS T1 JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.country_id WHERE T1.name = 'England';
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the name of the country 'England' and the name of its corresponding football league.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, COUNT(T2.id) AS num_attributes FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id GROUP BY T1.player_name;
result_summary: Returns 10848 rows, providing a count of all associated attribute records for each unique player name.

sql: SELECT T1.team_long_name, AVG(T2.buildUpPlaySpeed) AS avg_speed FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id GROUP BY T1.team_long_name;
result_summary: Returns 285 rows listing each team's long name along with their calculated average build-up play speed.

sql: SELECT T2.name, COUNT(T1.id) AS num_leagues FROM League AS T1 JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id GROUP BY T2.name;
result_summary: Returns 11 rows, listing each country's name along with the total number of leagues associated with that country.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, MAX(T2.potential) AS max_potential FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id GROUP BY T1.player_name ORDER BY max_potential DESC;
result_summary: Returns 10848 rows listing each player's name along with their maximum recorded potential, ordered from highest to lowest potential.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id GROUP BY T1.player_name HAVING COUNT(T2.id) > 2;
result_summary: Returns 10695 rows listing the names of players who have more than two associated attribute entries in the database.

sql: SELECT T1.team_long_name FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T2.defenceDefenderLineClass = 'Cover' GROUP BY T1.team_long_name;
result_summary: Returns 285 rows providing a unique list of long team names for all teams whose defensive line classification is 'Cover'.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, MAX(T2.date) AS last_update FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id GROUP BY T1.player_name;
result_summary: Returns 10848 rows listing each player's name along with the date of their most recent attribute update.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.overall_rating > 65 AND T2.preferred_foot = 'right';
result_summary: Returns 6534 rows listing the unique names of all right-footed players who have an overall rating greater than 65.

sql: SELECT buildUpPlayPositioningClass, COUNT(*) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE buildUpPlayPositioningClass = 'Organised' GROUP BY buildUpPlayPositioningClass;
result_summary: Returns 1 row providing a total count of teams that have an 'Organised' build-up play positioning style.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, AVG(T2.reactions) as avg_reactions FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id GROUP BY T1.player_name HAVING avg_reactions > 45;
result_summary: Returns 10677 rows listing the name and calculated average reaction score for each player with an average score greater than 45.

sql: SELECT T2.name AS Country, T1.name AS League FROM League AS T1 JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id WHERE T2.id = 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row identifying the league and country name for the specific country with an ID of 1.

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT player_api_id) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE preferred_foot = 'right';
result_summary: Returns a single row containing the total count of unique players who are right-footed.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, AVG(T2.overall_rating) FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id GROUP BY T1.player_name HAVING AVG(T2.overall_rating) > (SELECT AVG(overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes);
result_summary: Returns 4108 rows identifying players whose average overall rating is greater than the global average, showing each player's name and their calculated average rating.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, T2.overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = T1.player_api_id);
result_summary: Returns 11064 rows, providing each player's name along with their most recent overall rating based on the latest available data.

sql: SELECT T1.team_long_name FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id GROUP BY T1.team_long_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.buildUpPlaySpeedClass) > 1;
result_summary: Returns 160 rows listing the long names of teams that have been classified with more than one distinct build-up play speed style.

sql: SELECT player_name, height FROM Player WHERE height > (SELECT AVG(height) FROM Player);
result_summary: Returns 5870 rows listing the name and height of every player who is taller than the average player height.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Player_Attributes AS T2 WHERE T2.player_api_id = T1.player_api_id AND T2.overall_rating > 70);
result_summary: Returns 5631 rows listing the names of all players who have had an overall rating greater than 70 at any point.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.preferred_foot = 'right' EXCEPT SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.attacking_work_rate = 'medium';
result_summary: Returns 1866 rows listing the names of all right-footed players, excluding those who have a 'medium' attacking work rate.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, T2.potential, T2.overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.potential > (SELECT AVG(potential) FROM Player_Attributes) AND T2.overall_rating < (SELECT AVG(overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes);
result_summary: Returns 19826 rows identifying players who have above-average potential but a below-average current overall rating, listing each player's name along with their potential and rating scores.

sql: SELECT T1.team_long_name FROM Team AS T1 WHERE T1.team_api_id IN (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team_Attributes WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2015') AND T1.team_api_id IN (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team_Attributes WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2010');
result_summary: Returns 206 rows listing the long names of football teams that were active or had attributes recorded in both the years 2010 and 2015.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id GROUP BY T1.player_name HAVING MAX(T2.potential) > 70 AND AVG(T2.overall_rating) < 66;
result_summary: Returns 2698 rows listing the names of players who have shown high potential (a peak potential rating over 70) but maintained a lower average performance (an average overall rating below 66).

sql: SELECT T1.name, T2.name FROM League AS T1 JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id WHERE T1.name = 'England Premier League' UNION SELECT T1.name, T2.name FROM League AS T1 JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id WHERE T1.name = 'France Ligue 1';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the league name and its corresponding country name for the 'England Premier League' and 'France Ligue 1'.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, T2.date, T2.overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.overall_rating = (SELECT MIN(overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = T1.player_api_id);
result_summary: Returns 29762 rows identifying each player's lowest-ever overall rating, along with their name and the date(s) on which this minimum rating occurred.

sql: SELECT T1.team_long_name, AVG(T2.defencePressure) FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T2.defencePressureClass = 'Medium' GROUP BY T1.team_long_name HAVING AVG(T2.defencePressure) > (SELECT AVG(defencePressure) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE defencePressureClass = 'Medium');
result_summary: Returns 126 rows listing teams with an above-average defensive pressure within the 'Medium' pressure classification, showing each team's name and their specific average pressure score.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN (SELECT player_api_id, COUNT(*) AS num_entries FROM Player_Attributes GROUP BY player_api_id) AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.num_entries > 3;
result_summary: Returns 10,571 rows listing the names of players who have more than three recorded entries in the player attributes table.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, (SELECT T2.overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes AS T2 WHERE T2.player_api_id = T1.player_api_id ORDER BY T2.date DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT T3.overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes AS T3 WHERE T3.player_api_id = T1.player_api_id ORDER BY T3.date ASC LIMIT 1) AS rating_change FROM Player AS T1 WHERE T1.player_api_id = 505942;
result_summary: Returns 1 row for a specific player (ID 505942), calculating the total change in their overall rating by subtracting their earliest recorded rating from their most recent one.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 WHERE T1.player_api_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT player_api_id FROM Player_Attributes);
error_message: Discarded: Executed successfully but returned 0 rows.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id GROUP BY T1.player_api_id HAVING MAX(T2.overall_rating) > 65 AND MIN(T2.overall_rating) < 65;
result_summary: Returns 5091 rows listing the names of players whose overall rating has fluctuated, having at some point been both above and below 65.

sql: SELECT T1.team_long_name FROM Team AS T1 WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.buildUpPlayDribblingClass) FROM Team_Attributes AS T2 WHERE T2.team_api_id = T1.team_api_id) > 1;
result_summary: Returns 240 rows listing the long names of teams that have more than one distinct 'Build Up Play Dribbling Class' attribute recorded.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.player_name FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id JOIN Player AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '2015' AND strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '2016' AND T2.overall_rating > T1.overall_rating;
result_summary: Returns 3605 rows listing the unique names of players whose overall rating improved from 2015 to 2016.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 WHERE T1.player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player_Attributes WHERE preferred_foot = 'right') AND T1.player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player_Attributes WHERE attacking_work_rate = 'medium');
result_summary: Returns 7040 rows listing the names of players who are right-footed and have a medium attacking work rate.

sql: SELECT T1.team_long_name, T2.date, T2.buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T2.buildUpPlaySpeed > (SELECT AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE team_api_id = T1.team_api_id);
result_summary: Returns 722 rows listing the team name, date, and build-up play speed for specific instances where a team's play speed was higher than its own historical average.

sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', date) AS attribute_year, AVG(overall_rating), MIN(overall_rating), MAX(overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes GROUP BY attribute_year HAVING COUNT(*) > 1000;
result_summary: Returns 10 rows summarizing player ratings for each year with over 1000 records, providing the average, minimum, and maximum overall rating for that year.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name, T1.height, T1.weight FROM Player AS T1 WHERE T1.height > (SELECT AVG(height) FROM Player) AND T1.weight < (SELECT AVG(weight) FROM Player);
result_summary: Returns 1481 rows listing the name, height, and weight of players who are taller than the average player but weigh less than the average player.

sql: SELECT T1.team_long_name FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id GROUP BY T1.team_long_name HAVING MIN(T2.buildUpPlaySpeed) > 50 AND MAX(T2.chanceCreationShooting) < 60;
result_summary: Returns 19 rows listing the names of teams whose play style consistently involves fast build-up play (speed attribute always > 50) and a relatively low shooting tendency (shooting attribute always < 60).

sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.reactions > (SELECT T3.reactions FROM Player_Attributes AS T3 JOIN Player AS T4 ON T3.player_api_id = T4.player_api_id WHERE T4.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' ORDER BY T3.date DESC LIMIT 1);
result_summary: Returns 177,572 rows listing the names of players with a 'reactions' attribute score higher than the most recent score recorded for the player 'Aaron Appindangoye'.

sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id GROUP BY T1.player_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.attacking_work_rate) = 1 AND MAX(T2.attacking_work_rate) = 'medium';
result_summary: Returns 5667 rows listing the names of players who have only ever been recorded with a 'medium' attacking work rate.

sql: SELECT * FROM department;
result_summary: Returns 15 rows, providing a complete list of all departments with their ID, name, creation year, ranking, budget in billions, and number of employees.

sql: SELECT * FROM head;
result_summary: Returns 10 rows listing all recorded heads, showing their ID, name, birth state, and age.

sql: SELECT name, age FROM head ORDER BY age DESC;
result_summary: Returns 10 rows listing the name and age of each head, ordered from oldest to youngest.

sql: SELECT Name, Creation FROM department WHERE Creation = '1789';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the name and creation year for all departments that were founded in the year 1789.

sql: SELECT SUM(Num_Employees) FROM department;
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing a single value: the total number of employees across all departments.

sql: SELECT AVG(age) FROM head;
result_summary: Returns 1 row showing the overall average age for all heads.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT born_state FROM head;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the unique states where heads of organizations were born.

sql: SELECT name, born_state FROM head WHERE born_state = 'Alabama';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of heads who were born in the state of 'Alabama'.

sql: SELECT Name FROM department WHERE Ranking = 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the name of the top-ranked department.

sql: SELECT * FROM management;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing all management assignments, showing the department ID, the head's ID, and whether the role is temporary.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, T2.head_ID FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing department names and their corresponding management head IDs, based on the join between the department and management tables.

sql: SELECT T1.name, T2.department_ID FROM head AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.head_ID = T2.head_ID;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the name of each department head along with the ID of the department they manage.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, COUNT(T2.head_ID) FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID GROUP BY T1.Name;
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing each department name along with the corresponding count of department heads.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID WHERE T2.temporary_acting = 'Yes';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the unique names of departments that have a manager serving in a temporary acting capacity.

sql: SELECT Creation FROM department GROUP BY Creation HAVING AVG(Budget_in_Billions) > 10;
result_summary: Returns 13 rows listing the creation years of departments, filtered to include only those years where the average departmental budget was greater than 10 billion.

sql: SELECT T1.name FROM head AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.head_ID = T2.head_ID WHERE T2.department_ID = 2;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of the heads responsible for the department with ID 2.

sql: SELECT name, age FROM head WHERE age > (SELECT AVG(age) FROM head);
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing the names and ages of heads who are older than the average age of all heads.

sql: SELECT Name, Budget_in_Billions FROM department WHERE Budget_in_Billions > (SELECT Budget_in_Billions FROM department WHERE Name = 'State');
result_summary: Returns 13 rows listing the name and budget for each department whose budget is greater than that of the 'State' department.

sql: SELECT name FROM head WHERE born_state = 'Alabama' UNION SELECT name FROM head WHERE born_state = 'California';
result_summary: Returns 6 rows listing the names of all heads who were born in either Alabama or California.

sql: SELECT born_state, COUNT(*) FROM head GROUP BY born_state;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing each state and the corresponding count of heads born in that state.

sql: SELECT T1.name FROM head AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.head_ID = T2.head_ID WHERE T2.temporary_acting = 'Yes';
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the names of department heads who are currently serving in a temporary acting capacity.

sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID WHERE T2.head_ID = 5;
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the name of the department that is managed by the head with an ID of 5.

sql: SELECT T1.name, COUNT(T2.department_ID) FROM head AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.head_ID = T2.head_ID GROUP BY T1.name;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows listing each head's name along with the total count of departments they manage.

sql: SELECT T1.name FROM head AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.head_ID = T2.head_ID WHERE T1.born_state = 'California';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of management heads who were born in California.

sql: SELECT Name, Num_Employees FROM department WHERE Num_Employees > 100000;
result_summary: Returns 7 rows listing the name and number of employees for large departments with more than 100,000 employees.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, T3.name, T2.temporary_acting FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID;
result_summary: Returns 5 rows detailing each department's leadership, including the department name, the head's name, and whether their role is temporary.

sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID GROUP BY T1.Name HAVING COUNT(T2.head_ID) > 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row listing the name of any department that has more than one head or manager.

sql: SELECT born_state FROM head GROUP BY born_state ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row identifying the single most common state of birth among all heads, based on the highest count.

sql: SELECT T3.name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID WHERE T1.Creation = '1789';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of the heads who manage departments that were created in the year 1789.

sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID WHERE T2.temporary_acting = 'Yes' ORDER BY T1.Num_Employees DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row identifying the name of the largest department, by employee count, that is currently managed by a person in a temporary acting role.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM head AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.head_ID = T2.head_ID WHERE T1.age > (SELECT AVG(age) FROM head);
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the unique names of heads in management whose age is greater than the average age of all heads.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID WHERE T3.born_state <> 'Alabama';
result_summary: Returns 3 rows listing the unique names of departments whose head was born in a state other than 'Alabama'.

sql: SELECT SUM(T1.Budget_in_Billions) FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID WHERE T3.born_state = 'California';
result_summary: Returns 1 row calculating the total budget, in billions, for all departments managed by a head born in California.

sql: SELECT T3.name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID WHERE T1.Budget_in_Billions > 10;
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing the names of heads who manage departments with a budget greater than 10 billion.

sql: SELECT name FROM head WHERE born_state = 'Alabama' UNION SELECT T3.name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Treasury';
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing the names of heads who were born in Alabama, combined with the name of the head of the Treasury department.

sql: SELECT name FROM head WHERE born_state = 'California' INTERSECT SELECT T1.name FROM head AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.head_ID = T2.head_ID;
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of heads who were born in California and are also part of the management team.

sql: SELECT T1.Creation, AVG(T3.age) FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID GROUP BY T1.Creation;
result_summary: Returns 4 rows showing the average age of department heads, grouped by the creation year of their respective departments.

sql: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Budget_in_Billions FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID ORDER BY T3.age DESC LIMIT 1;
result_summary: Returns 1 row showing the name and budget of the department managed by the eldest head.

sql: SELECT T3.name, T1.Num_Employees FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID WHERE T1.Num_Employees > 50000;
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing the name of each department head and the corresponding employee count for large departments with more than 50,000 employees.

sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID WHERE T1.Budget_in_Billions > (SELECT AVG(Budget_in_Billions) FROM department) GROUP BY T1.Name;

sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM department AS T1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM management AS T2 WHERE T2.department_ID = T1.Department_ID);

sql: SELECT name FROM head WHERE head_ID IN (SELECT head_ID FROM management WHERE department_ID = (SELECT Department_ID FROM department WHERE Name = 'Treasury'));

sql: SELECT T3.born_state, SUM(T1.Budget_in_Billions) FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID GROUP BY T3.born_state;
result_summary: Returns 4 rows listing the total departmental budget in billions, aggregated by the birth state of the respective department heads.

sql: SELECT T3.name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID WHERE T2.temporary_acting = 'Yes' AND T1.Ranking > (SELECT Ranking FROM department WHERE Name = 'Treasury');
result_summary: Returns 1 row containing the name of a temporary acting head whose department is ranked higher than the Treasury department.

sql: SELECT T1.name FROM head AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.head_ID = T2.head_ID WHERE T1.age = (SELECT MIN(age) FROM head);

sql: SELECT Name FROM department WHERE Department_ID NOT IN (SELECT department_ID FROM management WHERE temporary_acting = 'Yes');
result_summary: Returns 13 rows listing the names of departments that are not managed by someone in a temporary acting role.

sql: SELECT T3.name, T3.age FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID WHERE T1.Num_Employees > 100000;
result_summary: Returns 3 rows identifying the names and ages of heads for departments that have more than 100,000 employees.

sql: SELECT name FROM head WHERE born_state = 'Alabama' EXCEPT SELECT T3.name FROM department AS T1 JOIN management AS T2 ON T1.Department_ID = T2.department_ID JOIN head AS T3 ON T2.head_ID = T3.head_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Treasury';
result_summary: Returns 2 rows listing the names of heads who were born in Alabama, excluding any who manage the Treasury department.
